name: Neusoft Corporation
summary: Neusoft Corporation provides information technology (IT) solutions and services worldwide. The company offers products and platforms, such as TalentBase human capital management system; SkillBase, an e-learning system; group financial management and control system; customer relationship management system; enterprise asset management system; super electronic archive system; business process content management platform; and UniOffice, an office management system. Its products and platforms also include picture archiving and communication software system; digital signage network/system; NetEye security operations center platform; NetPatrol, a network application monitoring and management system; Aclome, a cloud management environment; UniEAP, a unified enterprise application practice application; OpenBASE, a database management system; mobile device management system; navigation system; and rear view assistance system. In addition, it provides engineering services, such as application development and maintenance, ERP consulting and implementation, software globalization and localization, professional testing and performance engineering, and IT infrastructure services; on-demand services, such as Telemedicine, Xikang, and Telematics; and management consultation, business process outsourcing, and IT education and training services. Further, the company develops medical products, such as MRI, digital X-ray, color doppler ultrasound, laboratory automation, radiation therapy, and nuclear medicine imaging equipment, as well as CT scanners; and network security appliances. It serves telecom, energy, FSI, government, manufacturing, trade logistics, healthcare, education, transportation, automotive electronics, mobile terminals, digital home products, IT products, broadcasting and cinema, retail electronics, industrial control, and network security appliance sectors. The company was founded in 1991 and is headquartered in Shenyang, the People's Republic of China.
